pageSubtitle: Common questions about our restaurant, website, and your data

items.question: What are your opening hours?
items.answer:
Bandra West: Tue–Sat 7 AM – 3:30 PM & 5 – 11:30 PM. Sunday 7 AM – 4 PM & 5 – 11:30 PM. Monday closed.
Juhu: Check @benne.bombay on Instagram for latest timings.

items.question: Where are you located?
items.answer:
Bandra West: Shop no. 1, Plot 85, TPS 3, Louis Bell Building, 16th Rd, opp. Shree Sagar, Bandra West, Mumbai 400050.
Juhu: Ground floor, Nirav Apartment, 1, Gulmohar Rd, next to IDFC First Bank, Juhu, Mumbai 400049.

items.question: Is the food 100% vegetarian?
items.answer: Yes. Benne is a fully vegetarian restaurant. We do not serve eggs, meat, or seafood — just like the darshinis in Bangalore that inspired us.

items.question: Do you take reservations?
items.answer: No. We operate on a walk-in basis only, in the true darshini style. There are standing tables and no chairs — it's quick, authentic, and part of the experience.

items.question: What is a "darshini"?
items.answer: A darshini is a type of quick-service vegetarian restaurant common in Bangalore. Standing tables, self-service, no frills — just great food served fast. We've brought that same format to Mumbai.

items.question: Do you offer takeaway or delivery?
items.answer: We primarily focus on dine-in. Takeaway availability may vary by location. We are also listed on Zomato — check there for delivery options.

items.question: How much does a meal cost?
items.answer: An average meal costs ₹200–400 per person. Our dosas start from ₹100 and filter coffee is ₹40.

items.question: What personal data do you collect?
items.answer: Only what you voluntarily provide through our contact form: your name, email, subject, and message. We also collect basic server logs (IP address, browser type). That's it.

items.question: Do you sell my data to third parties?
items.answer: No. Never. Your data is confidential and will never be sold, rented, or shared with any third party for marketing or commercial purposes. Read our full Privacy Policy for details.

items.question: How can I get my data deleted?
items.answer: Email us at hello@shimowfoods.com with your request. Under the DPDP Act 2023, you have the right to request erasure of your personal data. We'll process your request within 30 days.

items.question: How long do you keep my data?
items.answer: Contact form submissions are retained for up to 12 months, then permanently deleted. You can request earlier deletion at any time.

items.question: Does this website use cookies?
items.answer: We don't use first-party tracking cookies. However, our Contact page embeds Google Maps, which may set third-party cookies under Google's Privacy Policy.

items.question: Are there third-party links on this site?
items.answer: Yes — we link to Google Maps, Instagram, Zomato, and WhatsApp. These are governed by their own terms and privacy policies. We are not responsible for their content or practices.

items.question: Who operates this website?
items.answer: This website is operated by Shimow Hospitality Pvt. Ltd., the company behind Benne. For any queries, email hello@shimowfoods.com.
